phase_title: Owner Local TxLINE Mainnet Read-Only Smoke
activation_note: The owner approved one local read-only TxLINE mainnet smoke for fixture and score only: no odds, database write, wallet operation, subscription, activation, token acquisition, deployment, or other production operation. Execute only from the authorized clean main clone D:\money\matchpulse_mainnet_test after the governance change is merged and HEAD equals origin/main.
